title: Caulinia ancistrocarpa

Caulinia ancistrocarpa is native to Australia, where it grows in aquatic environments. The plant is a type of water weed, characterized by its submerged leaves and flowers. It is a monocot, belonging to the monocotyledonous family Haloragaceae.
